title: Trinamool’s ‘nepo babies’ face tough contest in 2026 Assembly election
description: Trio includes Shrreya Pande, daughter of late Minister Sadhan Pande from Maniktala; Sirsanya Banerjee, son of MP Kalyan Banerjee from Uttarpara; and Tirthankar Ghosh, son of chief whip Nirmal Ghosh from Panihati
